_meta.description: Code coverage baselines for regression detection. Measured via xcodebuild test with -enableCodeCoverage YES.
_meta.methodology: macOS unit tests via test_macos (UnitTests.xctestplan), 1407 tests passing, coverage extracted via xcrun xccov from .xcresult bundle.
_meta.notes: App-code coverage (Edge AI Lab.app) is the primary metric. Test target coverage reflects test-file self-coverage and is not actionable. MarkdownUI is a third-party dependency — excluded from coverage goals.

overall.notes: Includes all targets. Inflated by test-target self-coverage; deflated by MarkdownUI (0%).

app_code.notes: Primary metric — this is what matters for production code quality.

macOS_ui_tests.notes: UI tests are not run via UnitTests.xctestplan — coverage is expected to be 0% here.

MarkdownUI.notes: Third-party dependency — excluded from coverage goals.

coverage_gap_summary.notes: Most zero-coverage files are SwiftUI views. These require UI tests or snapshot tests to improve coverage. Logic-heavy files (ViewModel, Store, Runner) already have strong coverage.

change_log.author: automation
change_log.description: Coverage push Phase 1-4: +499 tests (908→1407). 18 new test files covering EvalResultPersistence, AutomationEvent, DeviceMetrics, SavedConversation, MCPServerConfig, URLImportCoordinator, KaggleTokenStorage, EvalImageLoader, ExperimentalFlagsState, OnboardingManager, DynamicMCPBridge, InstrumentedEngine, HFModelBrowser, DownloadManager, ConversationViewModel, DesignSystemTiers, EvalComparisonLogic, BenchmarkComparisonLogic. Extracted EvalComparisonLogic + BenchmarkComparisonLogic from views. App-code coverage 26.6%→28.4%. Test target coverage 82.1%→85.6%.

change_log.author: automation
change_log.description: Coverage session 3: +42 tests (866→908). Extracted EvalRunnerLogic (100%) and ModelDetailFormatters (100%) from zero-coverage SwiftUI views. Added ModelSessionControllerTests (8), ConversationViewModelMCPTests (5), EvalRunnerLogicTests (15), ModelDetailFormattersTests (parameterized). Expanded DeveloperAutomationHarnessTests (+8, now 12.7%). Raised CI coverage floor 20%→25%. ConversationViewModel+MCP 48.1%→80.0%.

change_log.author: automation
change_log.description: Initial coverage baseline established. 785 tests passing. App-code coverage at 25.6%. Coverage enabled in all 6 test plans.
